title: Brother and my hike-run around Chataqua and the foothills

transcript.text: All right, here we are running up the trailhead. I haven't run up this for like 20 years
Brought what? I don't know in case we're out here a really long time
In case we climb green. That's green. There goes Wyndham
Brought what? I don't know in case we're out here a really long time
In case we climb green. That's green
Here's a close-up of the third flat iron
Go see you. Here's another shot of the flat irons
So beautiful, isn't it nice? So groovy
